plan_metadata.name: group  debug in teams local sample data analyst

steps.description: Press the F1 key to invoke the Command Palette in the Visual Studio Code application interface, enabling access to various actions and commands in the development environment.
Type text into the Visual Studio Code command palette: '>Debug: Select and Start Debugging'.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" option from the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code.
Type text: 'Debug(Chrome)' into the "Run and Debug" dropdown search field in the Visual Studio Code interface, focusing on a debugging configuration selection context.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Debug (Chrome)" option in the dropdown menu within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click inside the "Email, phone, or Skype" input field on the Microsoft login page to activate and prepare it for text entry.
Enter ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}} into the email or username input field on the Microsoft Sign in page at login.microsoftonline.com in a Chrome browser.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the email address in the Microsoft Sign-in form and proceed to the next step.
Type ${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}} into the 'Password' field on the Microsoft login page for user ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}}.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the login password in the Microsoft sign-in page form after entering the "Enter password" field.
Click the "Yes" button on the "Stay signed in?" prompt within the Microsoft login interface to confirm staying signed in.
Click the "Add" or "Open" button on the app details popup within the Microsoft Teams interface.
Click the "Open" button in the "Added successfully!" dialog for the vscuse_app_PuJoblocal app within Microsoft Teams web interface.
